title: How Deep Is Your Love
why_this_song: How Deep Is Your Love by Bee Gees (1977) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 13 times; first heard in: "How deep is your love"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "I really mean to learn"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "I really mean to learn"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "I really mean to learn"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "'Cause we're living in a world of fools"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "deep" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "deep" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "really" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "really" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I know your eyes in the morning sun
You're my savior when I fall

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I wanna feel you in my arms again
'Cause we're living in a world of fools

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "How Deep Is Your Love" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "How Deep Is Your Love", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "How Deep Is Your Love" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "How Deep Is Your Love" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "How Deep Is Your Love", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "How Deep Is Your Love", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
